scripts.dev: npm run pruning:native && RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_MODEL=scanner/models/tile-detector.onnx RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_INPUT_SIZE=640 RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_CONFIDENCE=0.5 concurrently -k -n api,vision,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run api:dev" "npm run vision:dev" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.api:dev:watch: if command -v cargo-watch >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo watch -x "run -p rubiks-cube-solver-api"; else cargo run -p rubiks-cube-solver-api; fi
scripts.vision:install: python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r scanner/runtime/requirements.txt -r scanner/requirements-test.txt
scripts.vision:dev: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn scanner.runtime.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8790 --reload; else python -m uvicorn scanner.runtime.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8790 --reload; fi
scripts.vision:start: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn scanner.runtime.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${RUBIKS_VISION_PORT:-8791}; else python -m uvicorn scanner.runtime.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${RUBIKS_VISION_PORT:-8791}; fi
scripts.vision:test: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest scanner/runtime; else python -m pytest scanner/runtime; fi
scripts.scanner:training:test: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest scanner/training; else python -m pytest scanner/training; fi
scripts.scan:label: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m scanner.training.scan_sessions.label; else python -m scanner.training.scan_sessions.label; fi
scripts.scan:replay: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m scanner.training.scan_sessions.replay --input scanner/outputs/local-sessions --output scanner/outputs/replay/latest --mode raw; else python -m scanner.training.scan_sessions.replay --input scanner/outputs/local-sessions --output scanner/outputs/replay/latest --mode raw; fi
scripts.scan:evaluate: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m scanner.training.scan_sessions.evaluate --input scanner/outputs/replay/latest --output scanner/outputs/reports/latest.json --hard-cases-output scanner/outputs/reports/latest-hard-cases.json --fail-on-wrong-accept; else python -m scanner.training.scan_sessions.evaluate --input scanner/outputs/replay/latest --output scanner/outputs/reports/latest.json --hard-cases-output scanner/outputs/reports/latest-hard-cases.json --fail-on-wrong-accept; fi
scripts.scan:tile-yolo-install-deps: PYTHON=${RUBIKS_PYTHON:-.venv/bin/python}; if [ ! -x "$PYTHON" ]; then PYTHON=python; fi; "$PYTHON" -m pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu torch torchvision && "$PYTHON" -m pip install -r scanner/training/requirements.txt ultralytics onnx onnxslim
scripts.scan:tile-yolo-roboflow-dataset: RUBIKS_ROBOFLOW_COCO_ZIP=${RUBIKS_ROBOFLOW_COCO_ZIP:-scanner/datasets/roboflow/rubiks-cube-colors-v2.coco.zip}; if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m scanner.training.tile_detector.yolo_dataset --roboflow-coco-zip "$RUBIKS_ROBOFLOW_COCO_ZIP" --output scanner/outputs/tile-yolo-roboflow-v2; else python -m scanner.training.tile_detector.yolo_dataset --roboflow-coco-zip "$RUBIKS_ROBOFLOW_COCO_ZIP" --output scanner/outputs/tile-yolo-roboflow-v2; fi
scripts.tunnel:check:prod: node scripts/check-port.mjs api ${RUBIKS_API_ADDR:-127.0.0.1:3001} && node scripts/check-port.mjs vision 127.0.0.1:${RUBIKS_VISION_PORT:-8791}
scripts.tunnel:run:prod: npm run tunnel:check:prod && npm run pruning:native && env -u VITE_RUBIKS_API_URL npm run build && npm run build:api && RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_MODEL=scanner/models/tile-detector.onnx RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_INPUT_SIZE=640 RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_CONFIDENCE=0.5 concurrently -k -n api,vision,tunnel -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start" "npm run vision:start" "npm run live:tunnel"
scripts.tunnel:run:dev: npm run pruning:native && RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_MODEL=scanner/models/tile-detector.onnx RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_INPUT_SIZE=640 RUBIKS_VISION_TILE_DETECTOR_CONFIDENCE=0.5 concurrently -k -n api,vision,web,tunnel -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "npm run api:dev:watch" "npm run vision:dev" "npm run web:dev" "npm run live:tunnel"
scripts.lint: npm run ai:check && npm run theme-colors:check && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web
scripts.pretest:e2e: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --phase1-max-depth 8 --phase2-max-depth 10 && VITE_RUBIKS_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run build
scripts.pdb:edge: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_edge_pdb -- --output-dir crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --max-depth 6 --pattern all
scripts.pdb:edge:deep: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_edge_pdb -- --output-dir crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --max-depth 8 --pattern all
scripts.product:gate: npm run ai:check && cargo fmt --check && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --phase1-max-depth 8 --phase2-max-depth 10 && npm run build && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web && npm run test:e2e && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report && npm run solver:real-scrambles:gate
